sources.title: Charlots Connection (1984) Film Français with English subtitles
sources.description:
Three unemployed buddies become the henchmen of a racketeer (despite themselves), and are trained in the middle of a gang war.

Director: Jean Couturier
Writers: René Havard, Richard Balducci
Stars: Jean Sarrus, Gérard Rinaldi, Gérard Filipelli
Genres: Cult, Classics, French Foreign Film

00:00 Full movie
00:15 🔫 Murders at the docks  🎵 A chaotic mix-up leads to a hilarious wedding ceremony filled with music and confusion.
10:52 🚗 A CEO hires two collectors to visit shops and retail outlets to collect rent payments.
26:10 🤔 A group of people come to a laundry shop to collect rent but are met with resistance.
32:32 🚗 A car is destroyed by a bulldozer, causing financial and emotional distress.
46:48 🎭 A group of people discuss their plans to carry out a blackmail scheme involving a woman named Rihanna.
55:05 🔒 Juliet is kidnapped by people working for Markod.
1:01:07 🔎 A group of individuals approach Madame Ryan to offer a deal to find a kidnapped girl and obtain a list of customers from Mr. Markoda.
1:07:14 🎪 A vintage circus performance takes a comedic turn when three impostors cause chaos.
1:15:26 🚗 Juliet and Adam search for their car and encounter a colleague who gives them a puzzling message.
